title_link:
Questionnaire - My name is Piotr Marecki and I am an Assistant Professor at the
Jagiellonian University in Krakow. Together with two 
demosceners, Yerzmyey and Hellboj, we decided to write a book
about the ZX Spectrum.
title_h1: ACNews 64 - Questionnaire - My name is Piotr Marecki and I am an Assistant Professor at the Jagiellonian University in Krakow. Together with two  demosceners, Yerzmyey and Hellboj, we decided to write a book about the ZX Spectrum.
